message:
feat(membrane): add EBR, complete Alien CS test coverage (proptest + E2E scaling)

- EBR (Epoch-Based Reclamation): 3-epoch bucket rotation, pin/unpin RAII
  guards, QuarantineEbr for UAF detection with configurable hold depth
- SeqLock fixes: writer serialization race fix, clippy cleanup
- 8 cross-concept integration tests (RCU+SeqLock, FC+EBR, full pipeline)
- 23 proptest property-based tests across all 4 concurrency primitives
- 22 E2E scaling tests (1/4/8/16 threads) for RCU, SeqLock, FC, EBR
- 8 EBR integration tests + 11 SeqLock integration tests
- Closes bd-1sp.8, bd-1sp.9, bd-1sp.10

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
